inspire_arc.title: Inspire Award Quest
inspire_arc.description: The FTC season is at its peak. Every portfolio entry and every robot test brings us closer to the top prize.

regional_sprint.title: Regional Sprint
regional_sprint.description: Only a few weeks left until competition. Time to refine oratory and ensure the code is flawless.

3d_priority.name: 3D Printer Priority
3d_priority.description: Jump to the top of the 3D printing queue for your personal project or test part.

programming_surge.name: Programming Surge
programming_surge.description: Doubles XP gain from all Programming quests for 24 hours.

engineering_surge.name: Engineering Surge
engineering_surge.description: Doubles XP gain from all Engineering quests for 24 hours.

writing_catalyst.name: Writing Catalyst
writing_catalyst.description: Doubles XP gain from all Technical Writing quests for 24 hours.

networking_surge.name: Networking Surge
networking_surge.description: Doubles XP gain from all Networking quests for 24 hours.

inspire_core_surge.name: Inspire Core Surge
inspire_core_surge.description: A discounted bundle that doubles XP gain from Engineering, Programming, and Writing quests for 24 hours.

omni_boost.name: Omni-Boost
omni_boost.description: Doubles XP gain from ALL quests, regardless of realm, for 24 hours.

streak_shield.name: Streak Shield
streak_shield.description: Automatically protects your daily streak for one missed day.

quest_reroll.name: Quest Re-roll
quest_reroll.description: Instantly receive a new set of daily quests from the System.

instant_streak.name: Instant Streak
instant_streak.description: Instantly sets your daily streak to 3 days, activating the streak bonus.

engineering_adept.name: Workshop Master
engineering_adept.description: Reached level 5 in an Engineering skill.

coding_adept.description: Reached level 5 in a Programming skill.

writing_adept.name: Engineering Chronicler
writing_adept.description: Reached level 5 in a Technical Writing skill.

networking_adept.name: Galactic Connector
networking_adept.description: Reached level 5 in a Networking skill.

initial_story.title: Bazinga! 73: The Journey Begins
initial_story.narrative: The workshop is lit. The chassis is on the table, and the blank portfolio awaits its first entries. The B-LEED System has been activated to guide the team's growth toward Worlds. Primary objective: Multidisciplinary Excellence. Winning the prize starts with your first line of code or your first bolt.

system_initialized: B-LEED System Initialized. Welcome, Bazinga! 73 member.
